title: SK Hynix clears HBM4 customer qualification ahead of consensus
description: Local Korean trade press reports HBM4 qualification with a major AI-accelerator customer, with Q4 volume production. Not yet covered by major international media.

title: Indonesia studies expanding raw-mineral export ban
description: Potential expansion of downstreaming policy to additional commodities. Material for global nickel and battery-metal supply chains.

title: Crude oil jumps on OPEC+ extended-cut signal
description: Supply-risk premium building. Positive for upstream producers, negative for net-importer refiners and inflation-sensitive EMs.

title: Red Sea reroutes lengthen Asia–Europe transit
description: Container rates rising; manufacturer working-capital and margin pressure for Asian exporters.

title: Samsung pushes double-digit DRAM contract-price increase
description: Early, concrete data point on the memory-pricing inflection. Leading indicator for the semiconductor earnings cycle.

title: SEBI tightens India derivatives margin and disclosure
description: Could reshape retail derivatives volumes and market-infrastructure revenue. Still local-only coverage.

title: Grupo México accelerates copper expansion into structural deficit
description: Concrete supply-side data point for the electrification thesis. Leads broader international coverage.

title: Petrobras board weighs extraordinary dividends
description: Capital-returns decision sensitive to government priorities; barometer for Brazilian state-enterprise governance.
